title: Santorini Infinity Pool Chic
promptText: chic high-fashion swimwear shot of an Indian woman, [same 100% identical face uploaded], [SKIN_TONE: Bronzed], wearing [BIKINI_STYLE: vibrant cobalt blue bandeau bikini], [LOCATION: Edge of an infinity pool in Santorini, Greece], [ACTION: Posing confidently, looking over shoulder, wet hair slicked back], [EMOTION: Sophisticated, trendy, luxurious], [LIGHTING: Harsh bright sunlight creating strong shadows], [BACKGROUND: Iconic white and blue dome churches and caldera view], brand embedding "GetAiPrompt.in" on the pool edge tiles, 8K, vogue magazine aesthetic, --ar 9:16.
